# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-04-12)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### The relationship between treatment methods and depressive mood in patients with low back pain: a cross-sectional study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the relationship between treatment methods and depressive mood in patients with bel ağrısı: a cross-sectional study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc musculoskeletal disorders. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: relationship, between, treatment, methods, depressive, mood.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41963906/

### Exploratory study of large language models in surgical decision-making for lumbar disc herniation: a multicenter analysis based on multisource clinical information.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik exploratory study of large language models in surgical decision-making for lomber (bel bölgesi) disc herniation: a multicenter analysis based on multisource clinical information. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc medical informatics and decision making. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: decision, making, exploratory, study, large, language.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41963879/

### Stable Mechanoreceptive Somatotopy in Chronic Low Back Pain: Is Cortical Map Reorganization a Myth?
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik stable mechanoreceptive somatotopy in chronic bel ağrısı: is cortical map reorganization a myth? konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: the journal of neuroscience : the official journal of the society for neuroscience. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: journal, neuroscience, stable, mechanoreceptive, somatotopy, chronic.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41963091/

### Spinal mobility and functional limitations in patients with diffuse idiopathic skeletal hyperostosis compared to healthy controls and patients with axial spondyloarthritis.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik spinal mobility and fonksiyonal limitations in patients with diffuse idiopathic skeletal hyperostosis compared to healthy controls and patients with axial spondyloarthritis. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: rmd open. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: patients, spinal, mobility, fonksiyonal, limitations, diffuse.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41963077/

### Significance of High-Intensity Zones in Lumbar Discs: A Correlation with Endoscopic Findings.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik significance of high-intensity zones in lomber (bel bölgesi) discs: a correlation with endoscopic findings. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of neurological surgery. part a, central european neurosurgery. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: significance, high, intensity, zones, lomber (bel bölgesi), discs.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41962574/

### Costs associated with delirium among older patients undergoing complex spine surgeries.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik costs associated with delirium among older patients undergoing complex spine surgeries. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of neurosurgery. spine. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: spine, costs, associated, delirium, among, older.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41962161/

### Intraoperative Bone-Quality Assessments Are Reliable Compared with Opportunistic CT-Based Hounsfield Unit Measurements.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik intraoperative bone-quality assessments are reliable compared with opportunistic ct-based hounsfield unit measurements. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: the journal of bone and joint surgery. american volume. 2026 apr 10. Anahtar kavramlar: bone, intraoperative, quality, assessments, reliable, compared.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41961974/

### Association between sociodemographic and injury factors in community reintegration following spinal cord injury: An analysis of two datasets.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik association between sociodemographic and injury factors in community reintegration following spinal cord injury: an analysis of two datasets. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: the south african journal of fizyoterapi. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: injury, association, between, sociodemographic, factors, community.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41960362/
